rationale: Most generators in this 10-bucket use `e.matchAll(regex)` + set-dedup map (9/10, all `robot` CLI). Feed `""`: matchAll yields empty iterator, for-loop body never executes, return `[]`. Rust `split_lines+filter_empty+json_extract(sentinel)` on `""` yields `[]`. Both empty. The 10th variant returns a mutated argument array (command array) and will `fail` — shape-too-loose outlier.
